task_completion.description: Navigate to the HVAC module in eQUEST
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is visible and the 'Air-Side HVAC' or similar HVAC component tree view is active.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target zone in the component tree
task_completion.visual_evidence: The zone named 'South Perim Zn (BB.S1)' or the system 'Sys1 (PSZ) (BB.C1)' is visible and selected/highlighted in the eQUEST project navigator or component tree.

task_completion.description: Open the properties dialog for the target zone
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog box or spreadsheet view specifically for 'South Perim Zn (BB.S1)' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Change the design cooling temperature to 76°F
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the zone properties, the field for Design Cooling Temperature (e.g., 'DESIGN-COOL-T', 'Design Cool T', or 'Cooling Setpoint') is set to the value '76'.
The agent clicks the floppy disk 'Save' icon, selects 'Save' from the 'File' drop-down menu, or a save confirmation dialog/status is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to modify the setpoint
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the eQUEST graphical interface and dialog boxes, rather than editing the .inp file directly in a text editor (like Notepad, Vim, or Nano).

integrity.description: Agent is editing the correct L_Shape project
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST main window title bar or project navigator displays 'L_Shape' or 'L_Shape.inp'.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows show the use of text-replacement commands (like sed, awk, or perl) to modify the .inp file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target zone 'South Perim Zn (BB.S1)' is the control zone for system 'Sys1 (PSZ) (BB.C1)'. Its initial DESIGN-COOL-T is 75°F. The agent must change this specific value to 76°F using the eQUEST GUI. The model is synthetic but correctly contains 4 floors.
